summary: Iteration 149: Verified all requested features - Camera crash fix (lazy loading), Vehicle Weight linked-rst fix, Print header custom_fields, VIGI camera settings, Weighbridge text removal. All 12 backend tests passed, all frontend tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: VehicleWeight.jsx: Camera lazy loading with 1.2s delay (line 165) prevents crash on tab switch
VehicleWeight.jsx: NVR badge renders correctly for vigi camera type (lines 363, 392)
VehicleWeight.jsx: Cleanup useEffect kills camera streams on unmount (lines 323-334)
App.js: setActiveTabSafe and setEntriesSubTabSafe call camera-kill-all endpoint on tab switch away from vehicle-weight
Settings.jsx: VIGI NVR fields include vigiFrontIp, vigiSideIp for direct camera IP configuration
vehicle_weight.py: linked-rst endpoint correctly queries mill_entries collection (line 318)
vehicle_weight.py: PDF export includes branding custom_fields via get_pdf_header_elements_from_db
seed_data_creation: Used existing data (4 vehicle weight entries, 3 mill entries)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 149 verified camera crash fix features. Key points: 1) Camera lazy loading with 1.2s delay prevents crash, 2) camera-kill-all endpoint called on tab switch, 3) VIGI NVR settings have Front/Side Camera IP fields (vigiFrontIp, vigiSideIp), 4) linked-rst API uses mill_entries collection, 5) Weighbridge section no longer shows 'Keshav Computer WetBridge' text. Camera hardware not available in test environment - only UI rendering verified.

features_tested.vehicle_weight_linked_rst: PASS - Returns RST numbers from mill_entries
features_tested.image_cleanup_setting: PASS - Returns days and enabled status
features_tested.subtab_mill_entries: PASS - Tab switching works without crash
features_tested.subtab_vehicle_weight: PASS - Tab loads with camera feed panels
features_tested.settings_camera_subtab: PASS - Shows VIGI NVR, IP Camera, USB Webcam options
features_tested.vigi_nvr_fields: PASS - Shows Front/Side Camera IP, NVR Channel, Username, Password
features_tested.nvr_badge_rendering: PASS - Code shows NVR badge for vigi camera type

mocked_features.camera_hardware: Camera streams require physical hardware - only UI rendering verified
mocked_features.weighbridge_serial: Serial port only available in Desktop App (Electron)
